expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus under “What this benchmark is checking (Phase 1)”: “Phase 1 must preserve context intake inputs needed before any scenario drafting, specifically for Google Sheets export: 1. Entry points … 2. Scope boundaries … 3. Format constraints …”. It also reiterates Phase 1 is “not to draft scenarios” but to generate spawn requests prior to drafting.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed as “Phase 1 (Context Intake) Contract Check” and describes Phase 1 responsibilities (context intake and spawn requests) and explicitly notes “Phase 1 work is not to draft scenarios, but to generate spawn requests…”. The assessment is made in Phase 1 terms (missing phase1_spawn_manifest.json, missing context/ artifacts), which aligns the output to phase1.
